title: Salary or wages
description: Refer this list on what is considered as income from salary or wages.

content_blocks.text: Income from salary or wages includes:

items: income from part-time or casual work
amounts for lost salary or wages paid under an income protection policy a sickness or accident insurance policy a workers compensation scheme

foreign employment. If you are an Australian Government agency employee (and not a member of a disciplined force), include here income earned from delivering Australian official development assistance. For more information, see Exempt foreign employment income .

content_blocks.text: If you received income for work or services performed in the Joint Petroleum Development Area (JPDA), you should have a PAYG payment summary – foreign employment . You may need to read the Joint Petroleum Development Area instructions to work out how to deal with your JPDA income at this section.

content_text:
Income from salary or wages includes:
- salary and wages
- commissions
- bonuses
- income from part-time or casual work
- parental leave pay
- dad-and-partner pay
- amounts for lost salary or wages paid under an income protection policy a sickness or accident insurance policy a workers compensation scheme
- foreign employment. If you are an Australian Government agency employee (and not a member of a disciplined force), include here income earned from delivering Australian official development assistance. For more information, see Exempt foreign employment income .
If you received income for work or services performed in the Joint Petroleum Development Area (JPDA), you should have a PAYG payment summary – foreign employment . You may need to read the Joint Petroleum Development Area instructions to work out how to deal with your JPDA income at this section.
